title: CanvasKit WASM initialization and caching utility
purpose: Provides a singleton instance of CanvasKit WASM library with configurable file location resolution.
module_context: Exports a singleton instance variable and an options interface for CanvasKit configuration.

steps.content: Check if a CanvasKit instance has already been initialized.
IF an instance exists, return it immediately.
ELSE initialize a new CanvasKit instance with the provided options.
IF no locateFile function is provided, use a default resolver that prepends '/' in browser environments.
Store the initialized instance in the module-level variable.
Return the newly initialized CanvasKit instance.
